name: create-vite-eject-vibe
description: Vite + React + Tailwind v4 template to host a Vibe's App.jsx
author: Vibes.diy

scripts.check: bash ./build-template.sh && cd template && cp _package.json package.json && npm install --no-audit --no-fund --loglevel=warn && npm run build && ./node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit && npx prettier --check . && rm -f package.json package-lock.json && rm -rf node_modules dist && cd - > /dev/null
